summary: Frontend bug fix testing completed for OmniVital wellness app. All 10 user-reported bug fixes verified. Tested hero background visibility, OV Voice button SVG mark, hero CTA navigation, PDP 'Back to Rituals' scroll behavior, and no white flash on navigation.

issues: Sign In/Join button in navbar uses rounded-lg while hero CTAs use rounded-sm - minor inconsistency but not blocking

critical_code_review_comments: React Router v7 future flag warnings still present - should add v7_startTransition and v7_relativeSplatPath flags
test_credentials: No auth credentials needed - tested public routes only
seed_data_creation: None - products are from static file src/data/products.ts
context_for_next_testing_agent: All 10 user-reported bug fixes verified working: 1) Hero background shows mountain landscape faintly visible through semi-transparent overlay (not pitch black), 2) OV Voice floating button uses SVG mark (ellipse + chevron path) - NO white square cutout from PNG, 3) Hero 'Join The Collective' button links to /auth (not #community), 4) Hero 'Explore The Ritual' button scrolls to #ritual section, 5) PDP 'Back to Rituals' link has href='/#ritual' with data-testid='pdp-back-link', 6) After clicking 'Back to Rituals' from PDP, page scrolls to ritual/products section (scroll position 1080, ritual section top=0), 7) No white flash on navigation - body/html background is rgb(10,10,10) = hsl(0,0%,4%), 8) Voice agent popup has close (X) button with data-testid='voice-panel-close', 9) Hero CTA buttons have rounded-sm for sharp corners, 10) Product cards render with daily ritual pricing ($X.XX / daily ritual)

hero_background_visibility.details: Hero section has 4 overlay divs with semi-transparent backgrounds. Mountain landscape faintly visible through overlay.

ov_voice_svg_mark.details: Voice button contains SVG with ellipse and path elements (O above V mark). No PNG image with white square cutout.

join_collective_auth_link.details: Hero 'Join The Collective' button has href='/auth'. Clicking navigates to /auth page correctly.

explore_ritual_scroll.details: Hero 'Explore The Ritual' button has href='#ritual'. Clicking scrolls page to ritual section (scroll position 1080).

pdp_back_link_href.details: PDP 'Back to Rituals' link has href='/#ritual' and data-testid='pdp-back-link'.

pdp_back_link_scroll.details: Clicking 'Back to Rituals' from /product/ov-drive navigates to /#ritual and scrolls to product grid (ritual section top=0, inView=true).

no_white_flash.details: Body and HTML background color is rgb(10, 10, 10) = hsl(0,0%,4%). No white flash on navigation.

voice_panel_close_button.details: Voice agent popup has close (X) button with data-testid='voice-panel-close'. Button closes panel correctly.

hero_cta_sharp_corners.details: Both hero CTA buttons have rounded-sm class for sharp corners. Explore button and Join button verified.

product_cards_daily_pricing.details: Product cards display daily ritual pricing format ($X.XX / daily ritual).
